creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<http://www.amd.com/> should be <https://www.amd.com/en.html>. 

<http://www.intel.com/info/em64t> redirects to <https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/architecture-and-technology/microarchitecture/intel-64-architecture-general.html>. 

None of <http://support.amd.com/us/Processor_TechDocs/32200.pdf>, <http://support.amd.com/us/Processor_TechDocs/24592_APM_v1.pdf> and <http://support.amd.com/us/Processor_TechDocs/24593_APM_v2.pdf> is found, all three redirect to <https://www.amd.com/en/support>. 

<http://www.x86-64.org/documentation/abi.pdf> and <http://www.x86-64.org/downloads.html> are 404, not found. 

<http://www.netbsd.org/Ports/amd64/> redirects to <https://wiki.netbsd.org/ports/amd64/>. 

Is anything else in the page lacking, or outdated?
